title: The garden center — picked over
premise: Evolution AFTER: someone has been back.

stages.narration: The place is a wreck now — shelving down, glass across the concrete, a dark stain worked into the spilled potting soil where the dead went over. Someone's been back since you: a bedroll folded in the seed-store, a child's crayon drawing weighted flat under a trowel. Not yours.

choices.label: Leave the drawing where it is

notes: Closes the before/during/after triple with a quiet moral coda + environmental storytelling.
